profiles.purposeTemplate: {moduleTitle} module handles authentication and protected-page access flows. Java files discovered: {javaCount}. Key routes: {topRoutes}
rules: If credentials are invalid, stay on login page and show validation message
If credentials are valid, establish session and return authentication success response
If session is expired, protected routes redirect to login
mustPreserve: Invalid credentials and session expiry handling (error codes, redirect targets)

profiles.purposeTemplate: {moduleTitle} module manages checklist decisions, status transitions, and WO-triggering rules. Java files discovered: {javaCount}. DB touchpoints: {topDbTouchpoints}
flows: Create or update WO on failure conditions
rules: If required checklist fields are missing, block submission and show errors
If checklist result indicates defect/failure, create or link a Work Order (WO)
If checklist is approved and all checks pass, status transitions to completed
If x and y conditions occur together, status becomes z according to business matrix
